# tokenVector(at:)

**Instance Method**

Gets a token vector at the index you specify.

## Declaration

```swift
@nonobjc func tokenVector(at index: String.Index) -> ([Double], Range<String.Index>)?
```

## Parameters

- **index**: The index to get the token vector at.

## Enumerating the vectors

- **enumerateTokenVectors(in:using:)**: Iterates over the embedding vectors corresponding to the subword tokens within the specified range of the input string.

items.description: Iterates over the embedding vectors corresponding to the subword tokens within the specified range of the input string.
items.name: enumerateTokenVectors(in:using:)
